title: JOYIN Make-a-Face Reusable Sticker Books 3-Pack (Safari, Farm, Sea Animals) - On The Go Travel Toys Activity Pad for Kids Ages 4-8(30 Scenes), Sticker Book for Children Party Bag
features: FUN ANIMAL THEMES: Set of 3 reusable travel activity Books (Safari, Farm, Sea).Animal faces to complete include cow, pig, lion, duck,monkey,cheetah,zebra,clownfish, and more.
REUSABLE STICKER BOOKS:Each with 10 faces and 10 sheets of reusable cling stickers, providing hours of creative fun for your child.
TRAVEL-FRIENDLY AND EDUCATIONAL: Our Make a Face Book Set is easy for kids to use, making it a convenient and educational travel toy for kids.
GREAT FOR ART AND IMAGINATION: Our reusable sticker books encourage creativity and imagination in kids, helping them develop their artistic skills and express themselves through play.
PREFECT FOR GIFT:A great gift for kids, ages 2 to 6, for hands-on, screen-free play.
